examples.text: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا مَجْنُونٌ وَازْدُجِرَ
examples.english: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of the verb جُنَّ (junna).
